use_cases: Selecting options from predefined lists in forms and settings panels
Implementing category or filter dropdowns in content management interfaces
Enabling user preferences with variant styles (outline, ghost) for flexible theming
Creating accessible select inputs with keyboard navigation support via Radix UI
Building multi-step wizard selections with smooth open/close animations
ai_summary: A customizable select/dropdown input component built on Radix UI primitives with full accessibility support. Features three visual variants (default, outline, ghost) and three size options (sm, default, lg) using class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Includes smooth dropdown animations via Motion React, custom icons (ChevronDown, Check), and integrates seamlessly into Shadcn-style design systems.
